Container.Name: roguemeso-db
Container.Overview: PostgreSQL 17 for RogueMeso. On first start it creates an empty database named by POSTGRES_DB. The RogueMeso app container then builds the schema (Prisma migrations) and seeds the exercise + program-template library automatically. Data lives on the NVMe cache for speed.
Container.Description: PostgreSQL 17 backing store for RogueMeso. Assign a static br0 IP and a strong POSTGRES_PASSWORD; the app's DATABASE_URL must point at this IP with the same user/password/db.

Config.Name: Database data
Config.Description: Postgres data directory (NVMe cache recommended for a DB).

Config.Name: POSTGRES_USER
Config.Description: Database user (must match the app DATABASE_URL).

Config.Name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Database password — set a strong value. Must match the app DATABASE_URL. Generate: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: POSTGRES_DB
Config.Description: Database name (must match the app DATABASE_URL).

Config.Name: Postgres port
Config.Description: Postgres port. Informational on br0 (ipvlan publishes nothing); the app reaches it at this IP:5432.
